summary: This is an extremely brief link post where Joel Spolsky shares that someone named Andy created a mashup integrating FogBugz (Fog Creek's bug tracking software) with TechSmith's SnagIt screenshot tool. The post contains virtually no analysis or commentary beyond a single word of approval. It serves as a quick signal boost for a community-built integration with Joel's product.
key_points: A developer named Andy built an integration between FogBugz and SnagIt
Joel used his blog to promote third-party tools built around his product
The post reflects the early blogging era's norm of very short link-sharing posts
key_insight: Joel used his blog platform to amplify community-built integrations with FogBugz, fostering a developer ecosystem around his product.
